title: Mordheim: City of the Damned - Witch Hunters
anchor_summary: Add-on warband campaign for a turn-based tactical skirmish RPG built around small-squad battles, unit progression, customization, and high-stakes campaign management in the Mordheim ruleset.

similar_games.title: Mordheim - City of the Damned
similar_games.why_similar: This DLC directly inherits the base game's turn-based warband skirmishes, campaign structure, progression, and injury-permadeath management.

similar_games.title: Battle Brothers
similar_games.why_similar: Small-band tactical combat, persistent roster development, equipment management, and punishing long-term losses make it a very close campaign-level match.

similar_games.title: XCOM 2
similar_games.why_similar: Turn-based squad tactics with heavy emphasis on soldier builds, risk management, and campaign consequences between battles.

similar_games.title: Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus
similar_games.why_similar: Another Warhammer turn-based tactics game focused on ability-driven squad composition, mission planning, and progression across a campaign.

similar_games.title: Necromunda: Underhive Wars
similar_games.why_similar: Games Workshop skirmish adaptation centered on gang-sized tactical battles, fighter customization, and campaign-style roster advancement.

llm_taxonomy.evidence_summary: Accepted via DLC inheritance from the parent game because the DLC is clearly additive: it adds a new Witch Hunters warband, unit types, and a playable campaign, with no evidence of a different core mode or genre. Parent-game stored descriptions explicitly identify Mordheim: City of the Damned as a turn-based tactical game where you lead warbands into lethal skirmishes, blending RPG progression, unit customization, gear, mission-based battles, and multiplayer. The DLC text reinforces the same warband-based tactical structure through unit classes, weapons, skills, spellcasting, and campaign content. This strongly supports turn_based_tactics as primary, with tactical_rpg as secondary due to unit growth, customization, and RPG progression layers.
